---
title: "Publications"
description: "Papers, preprints, and manuscripts."
---

## Selected publications and preprints

::: {.publication}
**Unconditionally Stable Gradient and Momentum Flow Solvers for Linear Systems**  
Rahul Manavalan and Mengwu Guo.  
*Manuscript in preparation.*

[PDF](assets/papers/sample-paper.pdf){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline} [BibTeX](#bibtex-linear-flows){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline}
:::

::: {.publication}
**Boundary-Aware Kernel Interpolation on Symmetric Domains**  
Rahul Manavalan and Elisabeth Larsson.  
*Manuscript in preparation.*

[PDF](assets/papers/sample-paper.pdf){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline} [BibTeX](#bibtex-boundary-kernels){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline}
:::

::: {.publication}
**Inertial Cahn--Hilliard Flows for Image Inpainting**  
Rahul Manavalan and Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb.  
*Manuscript in preparation.*

[PDF](assets/papers/sample-paper.pdf){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline} [BibTeX](#bibtex-inertial-inpainting){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline}
:::

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@unpublished{manavalan2026linearflows,
  title  = {Unconditionally Stable Gradient and Momentum Flow Solvers for Linear Systems},
  author = {Manavalan, Rahul and Guo, Mengwu},
  year   = {2026},
  note   = {Manuscript in preparation}
}
```

```bibtex
@unpublished{manavalan2026boundarykernels,
  title  = {Boundary-Aware Kernel Interpolation on Symmetric Domains},
  author = {Manavalan, Rahul and Larsson, Elisabeth},
  year   = {2026},
  note   = {Manuscript in preparation}
}
```

```bibtex
@unpublished{manavalan2026inertialinpainting,
  title  = {Inertial Cahn--Hilliard Flows for Image Inpainting},
  author = {Manavalan, Rahul and Sch{\"o}nlieb, Carola-Bibiane},
  year   = {2026},
  note   = {Manuscript in preparation}
}
```

## Optional: generate this page from BibTeX

For a larger publication list, keep entries in `references.bib` and render them with Quarto citations.
